bosses.name: Swamp Child (沼の忌み子)
bosses.strategy: Avoid swamp water to prevent sinking. Use ranged attacks to keep distance from its leech-like projectiles.

bosses.name: Demi-human Child (亜人の忌み子)
bosses.strategy: Fast movements. Watch for the 'Impregnation' status attack. Use Sword Magic for high burst damage when it pauses.

bosses.name: Mock Spawn (模造の落とし子)
bosses.strategy: High defense. Use Explosive Arrows to break its posture before attacking.

bosses.name: Stomach Child (胃の忌み子)
bosses.strategy: Complex environment with tentacles. Use Owl Magic to stay airborne and avoid floor hazards.

bosses.name: The Outer One (外なる者)
bosses.strategy: Must use Scivias Powder to see the true form. Manage MP carefully as it has high HP and multiple phases.
